description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area 3 times, pushing them back, and reduces their ATK Spd by [30%->15%] and Magic DEF by [35%->10%] for 4sec. Against non-hero enemies, each hit deals additional Magic DMG.
Deals Magic DMG to 2 enemy and inflicts [roots them->Bind] for [3.6 sec->2sec]. The damaged enemy takes 18% ATK Magic DoT every 0.5sec for 6sec, and Magic DMG taken is increased by [30%->20%].
Pulls enemies within range toward the center and deals Magic DMG 5 times. The final hit stuns enemies for [1.8 sec->1sec]. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional Magic DMG.

Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150. Each time damage is dealt, applies [Lea's Curse] to the target for 10sec. [Lea's Curse]: Critical Hit Chance is reduced by [250->100], and ATK is reduced by [25%->10%].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage increases by [80%->100%].

dark.unified: Roots the target for [1.2 sec.->1 sec.]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1000->2000], but the target is changed to all enemies.

dark.unified: Root duration increases by [0.9 sec.->2 sec.]

light.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [25%->15%] for 10 sec.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1000.]

light.unified: For each enemy affected by [Lea's Curse], your Attack increases by [{2}%->10%]. This effect stacks up to [{3}->5] times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Reduces the target’s Magic Critical Resistance by [25%->20%] for 10 sec.
On critical hit, reduces the target’s Status Resistance by [250->200] for 10 sec, and reduces the cooldown of all skills except the skill in use by 2%.

description.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, reduces target's Healing Rate by [50%->35%] for 10 sec and increases own Critical Damage by {0}%. The Critical Damage increase effect stacks up to 20 times.
